fonts.note: Matches Cool Hollow Solutions' real site font (Google Fonts, weights 300-700). No Coaching-specific font chosen yet, inherited as the starting point.

logo_note: No Cool Hollow Coaching mark exists yet. Cool Hollow Solutions' real compass/needle icon (refs/chs-logo-white-reference.png) is kept as visual-DNA reference only, not for direct reuse. Confirm with owner whether Coaching gets its own mark or inherits a variant of the compass icon.
devices_note: Solutions uses a compass/needle icon motif. Not confirmed yet whether Coaching shares this device. Flagged for owner decision.
style_block: Grounded, financial-advisory photography and illustration style. Deep teal and forest-green tones (#0E4643, #14313A) paired with a fresh sage-blue (#589BA8) and a lime-green energy accent (#B4D351). Clean, minimal compositions with soft natural light. Real business settings: a desk, a P&L on a screen, an owner mid-decision, not generic stock-photo gloss. Leave negative space for text overlay. No corporate clip-art, no fake smiling stock photography.

campaign.formula: Lead with the outcome, then the proof. [Pain point]. [The number/result]. [Plain next step.]
campaign.endcard: Cool Hollow Coaching · Business Without You
